scenes.name: system-sol-starter
scenes.note: Round 24: starter warp raised from the Phase N 43,200x interim cap to the Phase W day/s default (the ~1e5x 'inner system visibly moves' target).

scenes.name: laplace-dance
scenes.note: Phase W showcase: the 4:2:1 Laplace group's conjunction pattern at day/s — the resonant argument is a theorem (K3), watched live.

scenes.name: node-regression
scenes.note: Phase W showcase: luna's 18.6-y node regression and 8.85-y apsidal advance visibly precess the orbit line at decade/s (the line is a pure function of t).

scenes.name: belt-span
scenes.note: Phase B: the main belt as orbital-cell scatter over the density field — Kirkwood gaps are data; policed by harness/smallbody-e2e.mjs gate A (CPU-vs-GLSL member positions).

scenes.name: comet-perihelion
scenes.note: Phase B: coma + anti-sunward ion tail at the solved perihelion epoch (0.586 AU); the comet solver class holds the corner. Policed by smallbody-e2e gate B (predicted-ray coverage, aphelion negative control).
